character.description: compact right-facing ghost teacher boss: white ghost hair, gray tattered teacher coat, green chalkboard prop, friendly red eye accent

chroma_key.name: cyan
chroma_key.selection_reason: highest 1st-percentile subject distance among the 4 candidate(s) clearing the 96 erase radius

idle.action: subtle three-frame idle breathing and hover: a compact cute-spooky teacher ghost gently rises, settles, and returns; coat tails and chalkboard move slightly, stable baseline

style: The attached player anchor is the strict style and proportion SSoT: cute-spooky child-friendly Halloween painterly cartoon, compact chibi silhouette, saturated colors, thick dark outline, soft fixed-top-light shading, readable at small game size. Preserve only the ghost-teacher identity cues from the secondary reference; redraw every other visual decision in the player-anchor style. No realistic rendering, no flat vector/anime style, no thin outlines.
